_kno_commands() {
    local -a commands
    commands=(
'claim:Claim a knot and get its action prompt.' \
'cold:Cold-tier operations.' \
'compact:Run compaction operations.' \
'completions:Generate or install shell completions.' \
'doctor:Run repository health diagnostics.' \
'edge:Manage knot edges.' \
'fsck:Validate on-disk knots event/index data.' \
'help:Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)' \
'hooks:Manage git sync hooks (post-merge).' \
'init:Initialize local store, add .knots gitignore entries, and init remote.' \
'init-remote:Create remote knots branch and ensure .knots is gitignored.' \
'ls:List knots with filtering and layout.' \
'new:Create a new knot.' \
'next:Advance a knot to its next happy-path state.' \
'perf:Run performance harness checks.' \
'poll:Peek at the highest-priority claimable knot.' \
'profile:Inspect and manage workflow profiles.' \
'pull:Pull knot updates from the remote knots branch.' \
'push:Push local knot updates to the remote knots branch.' \
'q:Quick-create a knot using the default quick profile.' \
'ready:List knots queued for action (ready_for_* states).' \
'rehydrate:Rehydrate one knot from warm/cold/event data.' \
'show:Show one knot by id or alias.' \
'skill:Print the skill prompt for a knot'\''s next action state.' \
'state:Set a knot state with transition validation.' \
'step:Manage step execution history.' \
'sync:Push then pull knot updates.' \
'uninit:Remove local knots store artifacts and delete remote branch.' \
'uninstall:Uninstall kno from the system.' \
'update:Update knot fields and metadata in one command.' \
'upgrade:Self-update the kno binary.' \
    )
    _describe -t commands 'kno commands' commands "$@"
}
(( $+functions[_kno__claim_commands] )) ||
_kno__claim_commands() {
    local commands; commands=()
    _describe -t commands 'kno claim commands' commands "$@"
}

_kno_commands() {
    local -a commands
    commands=(
'claim:Claim a knot and get its action prompt.' \
'cold:Cold-tier operations.' \
'compact:Run compaction operations.' \
'completions:Generate or install shell completions.' \
'doctor:Run repository health diagnostics.' \
'edge:Manage knot edges.' \
'fsck:Validate on-disk knots event/index data.' \
'help:Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)' \
'hooks:Manage git sync hooks (post-merge).' \
'init:Initialize local store, add .knots gitignore entries, and init remote.' \
'init-remote:Create remote knots branch and ensure .knots is gitignored.' \
'ls:List knots with filtering and layout.' \
'new:Create a new knot.' \
'next:Advance a knot to its next happy-path state.' \
'perf:Run performance harness checks.' \
'poll:Peek at the highest-priority claimable knot.' \
'profile:Inspect and manage workflow profiles.' \
'pull:Pull knot updates from the remote knots branch.' \
'push:Push local knot updates to the remote knots branch.' \
'q:Quick-create a knot using the default quick profile.' \
'ready:List knots queued for action (ready_for_* states).' \
'rehydrate:Rehydrate one knot from warm/cold/event data.' \
'show:Show one knot by id or alias.' \
'skill:Print the skill prompt for a knot'\''s next action state.' \
'state:Set a knot state with transition validation.' \
'step:Manage step execution history.' \
'sync:Push then pull knot updates.' \
'uninit:Remove local knots store artifacts and delete remote branch.' \
'uninstall:Uninstall kno from the system.' \
'update:Update knot fields and metadata in one command.' \
'upgrade:Self-update the kno binary.' \
    )
    _describe -t commands 'kno commands' commands "$@"
}
(( $+functions[_kno__claim_commands] )) ||
_kno__claim_commands() {
    local commands; commands=()
    _describe -t commands 'kno claim commands' commands "$@"
}
(( $+functions[_kno__cold_commands] )) ||
_kno__cold_commands() {
    local commands; commands=(
'sync:Pull cold-tier updates from remote.' \
'search:Search cold catalog by term.' \
'help:Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)' \

}
